content: I just want dev keep his word . Buff Ryker and stop give him useless SF and AA . <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

I'm not going to lie, I saw his AA and was kinda disappointed on how weak it was, but then my brain sparked: higher value die means more gambling which means more dopamine for hitting higher numbers and seeing more numbers popping up on screen. 

It really was bad, but I hope they still keep the higher die cap ~~if~~ when they buff it so when I finally get +12 ryker, I can gamble with d8s or even d10s instead of d6s.....
No addition effect if u roll dice 8 or 9 . Just more draw+str from exalt or more tempo str from his unique 0 cost card . That really fking trash

Yeah, the effect, absolutely. You are completely right.

I was just talking about being able to gamble even more with higher possibilities in the dice.
It's higher chance to draw 6 cards from ult/get free 1 cost from his 2 cost/extra effects from 0 cost
Still very trashy considering other limited AA and his current position in the meta
Oh I agree with that, just saying it's not a "do nothing" like Celeste or something. But it's still underwhelming yeah
Thank you for your hard work, Morimens team 🙏

His image will help max roll so just play carefull it's ok . Now dice become 8 but it didnt give other any effect if u get higher roll except base effect   He is limited awaker and his SF + AA very bad
Aa as of currently only really benefit his oe
Pandia looking at everyone from the corner thinking this is neglect play or some shit
DW after frenzy she definitely became more like Leigh. Kuhihi
I appreciate a straight-talking letter like this. There's no PR platitudes, no corporate cliches. Thank you.
It's interesting that the reactions to the Chinese posts are much more negative. I assume they say the same things, so it must be a difference of context, culture, or expectations.

It's definitely the context. And they most of the time are older players than us the new gens when English showed up.

Light unfortunately has made too many promises in the past and many of them sadly are broken. 
So people are just jaded with him.

And as a whole people never like time sensitive pull currencies. 
Even if the Devs said they would give out more (which is a + if you are an active puller).

Also, the order of announcements is very bad 😔 

As for AA, people see it as a slippery slope. Even if the game is turbo generous and some of these were QOL that units would REALLY want. Also many of them are just...
Not the "promote unique playstyles" they were promised (oh look, broken promise)


Really after the patch drop, nothing really changed. Game still is very very good. 

I will change my tune when covenants become cringe to farm or roll.

Thank you for the insights!

I've always hated time-sensitive pull currencies in other games, but the details are different, and those games are just stingy and greedy overall. Like, last I checked, Where Winds Meet expires _paid_ pull currencies. It helps, too, that the Ethereal Cores convert to Pure Cores. Having the explanation for why Ethereal Cores exist is also very important to me, and it's an explanation that makes sense, given Morimens is so generous;  it's easy to imagine how the grey market would be taking advantage of it.

Unfortunately, the higher the expectations players have, the less tolerance they have for any shortcoming, so games that give you nothing and hate their players have the happiest players.

Except the explanation doesn't really make sense. They said the time-limited pulls were added to combat bots (and account reselling). Then they backtracked and said they would only be keeping them for big events and paid bundles. Why would they need to keep time-limited pulls on paid bundles? Since when are bots gonna pay for bundles?
